title: Tilray Brands Surges on Record $207 Million Q3 Revenue with Margin Recovery and German Cannabis Growth
text: Tilray Brands surged on record $207 million Q3 revenue with margin recovery in beverages and German cannabis growth signaling turnaround. Cannabis gross profit increased 18% to $26.0 million with cannabis gross margin at 40%. The company achieved 11% year-over-year revenue increase and 19% jump in adjusted EBITDA to $10.7 million. Net loss improved 97% to $25.2 million in the third quarter. Project 420 has realized $33 million in annualized cost savings. Cannabis net revenue increased 19% to $64.8 million driven by 73% increase in international cannabis revenue and 8% increase in Canadian adult-use and medical cannabis. German medical flower sales doubled in volume as recent regulatory shifts expanded the medical cannabis patient base. Tilray's acquisition of a trading license for Aphria RX in Germany marks a significant milestone with dual possession of cultivation and trading licenses giving competitive edge.
